channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: analyzing their SSD activity - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: analyzing their SSD activity  Ars Technica
  2. Researchers say they can spy on your browsing by measuring SSD activity through a browser API — claim FROST attack requires no permissions or user interaction to identify which apps and websites you're using  Tom's Hardware
  3. FROST Side-Channel Attack Turns SSD Activity Into A New Browser Privacy Nightmare  HotHardware
  4. Malicious Websites Exploit SSD Timing Signals to Monitor Visitor Activity  gbhackers.com
  5. Malicious Sites Track Users Through SSD Timing Side-Channel Attacks  cyberpress.org

item.title: Rumor: Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition Nintendo Switch 2 tech improvements detailed - Nintendo Everything
item.description:
1. Rumor: Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition Nintendo Switch 2 tech improvements detailed  Nintendo Everything
  2. Sonic Frontiers Definitive Edition is coming next month, it’s claimed  Video Games Chronicle
  3. Sonic Frontiers Definitive Edition Features Revealed  Insider Gaming
  4. Sonic Frontiers "Definitive Edition" Has Been Rated In Korea  Nintendo Life
  5. Sonic Frontiers reportedly coming to Switch 2 this summer  Niche Gamer

item.title: The ‘GTA 6’ Release Date Is Confirmed, And Everything We’ve Learned Recently - Forbes
item.description:
1. The ‘GTA 6’ Release Date Is Confirmed, And Everything We’ve Learned Recently  Forbes
  2. Take-Two Says ‘GTA VI’ Launch Still Set for Nov. 19  WSJ
  3. ‘GTA 6’ Price Still Not Revealed, but Take-Two Chief Says Rockstar on Track to Begin Marketing This Summer  Variety
  4. Take-Two Boss Knows You're Paying More For Gas, Groceries-Says You'll Buy GTA 6 Anyway  GameSpot
  5. Realistic bullet physics in new Grand Theft Auto VI footage  GameGPU

item.title: I Was Today Years Old When I Learned About These 22 "Hidden Features" Of My iPhone - BuzzFeed
item.description:
1. I Was Today Years Old When I Learned About These 22 "Hidden Features" Of My iPhone  BuzzFeed
  2. 12 new features Apple quietly added in iPhone updates  Popular Science
  3. How to Unlock the Hidden Customization Features in iOS 26.5  Geeky Gadgets
  4. 5 hidden iPhone features that make everyday tasks much easier  groovyPost
  5. 5 Hidden iPhone Features Most Users Don’t Know About  Geeky Gadgets

item.title: Xbox Game Pass quietly just got one of the year’s best shooters - Polygon.com
item.description:
1. Xbox Game Pass quietly just got one of the year’s best shooters  Polygon.com
  2. Steam may have just thrown its weight behind bullet heaven, but last week's standout game was a one-of-a-kind bullet hell FPS  PC Gamer
  3. After 7 years in development, an amazing single-player FPS just hit Steam and consoles: "We were heavily inspired by titles such as Nier Automata, Metroid Prime, Destiny, Halo"  Yahoo Tech
  4. New shooter looks strikingly similar to Destiny 2, launches with 86% positive reviews on Steam  Mein-MMO
  5. How to Beat Tortured Adrift in Luna Abyss: Full Boss Guide  games.gg
